title: tagetes moorei var. breviligulata
intro: Tagetes moorei var. breviligulata, also known as the Dwarf Mexican Marigold, is a variety of the Tagetes moorei plant, a flowering plant native to Mexico and the southwestern United States. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory properties, making it useful in the treatment of wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Tagetes moorei var. breviligulata include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, as well as its potential to treat conditions such as fever, cough, and cold. The herbal preparations of this plant typically include infusions, decoctions, and salves, which can be used topically or ingested to reap its medicinal benefits.
